description_long: This is a full-size computer keyboard with a beige or light tan color, featuring a standard array of rectangular keys including a number pad on the right side. The keys are slightly raised above the main body, and the keyboard has a low-profile, flat chassis with a subtle incline from front to back. The surface appears to be made of hard plastic, with a matte finish that reduces glare. There are no visible brand logos or decorative elements, giving it a utilitarian and classic appearance reminiscent of older office or industrial keyboards. The keycaps are uniformly colored, and there are no visible legends or labels on the keys. No cable or wireless receiver is visible, suggesting it may be a generic or placeholder model.
description: A beige, full-size keyboard with a number pad and a flat, matte plastic body. The keys are unlabeled and the design is simple and utilitarian.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the keyboard, including the number pad and all main keys.
description_view_1: Angled left-side view highlighting the depth and slight incline of the keyboard, with the leftmost keys more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back edge and the overall flatness of the keyboard's profile.
description_view_3: Angled right-side view focusing on the number pad and the rightmost keys.
